content.en:
"The Primordial Ancestral Realm has come to an end!"

Ye Tian got the news from the battle gate.

After such a long time, the ten supreme holy gates and many holy places played one by one, which was actually a game between the holy gates, and finally came to an end.

As for the result, Ye Tian was not very clear.

Actually, he didn't know much.

He only knew that after the Holy War, the Battle Gate had obtained a lot of places to enter the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and entering the quota only meant that there were more opportunities to obtain treasures, not that there were really a lot of treasures that could be obtained.

For example, some forces only enter one person, but that person is strong enough to still obtain a lot of treasures.

However, if there are many people, there are enough qualifications to join forces.

However, judging from the tones of several peerless domain ancestors, the gains of the battle gate are not small.

But there was also an invincible domain ancestor who fell, and three unrivaled domain ancestors were severely damaged.

That fallen Invincible Domain Ancestor was also one of the Thirty-Six War Emperors, second only to the Five Thunder Domain Ancestors in strength, but he fell in the Primordial Ancestral Realm, which was also unpredictable.

Perhaps soon, the Battle Gate will re-select a two-step invincible domain ancestor to be rated as the Thirty-Six War Emperor.

These things had nothing to do with Ye Tian, what he cared about was another matter, an opportunity that belonged to the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

This fate belongs to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and only the Supreme Domain Ancestor is allowed to enter, once the opportunity is sufficient, it is enough for Ye Tian to condense the Holy Soul.

This opportunity is a special world in the Primordial Ancestral Realm—the Holy Soul Realm!

The Holy Soul Realm is a special world that can give birth to a kind of Holy Soul Beast, and once you hunt the Holy Soul Beast, you can absorb the power of the Holy Soul to strengthen your own Holy Soul.

This kind of Holy Soul Beast cannot be brought out of the Holy Soul Realm, but the rules of the Holy Soul Realm are special, so such a Holy Soul Beast can be born.

In addition, there will be many treasures and even holy relics born in the Holy Soul Realm, and almost all the holy objects born in the Holy Soul Realm are soul holy objects, and if they are combined with the Holy Soul, they will exert a terrifying soul attack, thereby annihilating the soul of the enemy.

For example, the ice crystal yacon fruit that Ye Tian devoured before, there was also this kind of treasure in the Holy Soul Realm.

It is conceivable that the Holy Soul Realm is simply a supreme treasure for the ancestors of the Supreme Domain.

However, the Primordial Ancestral Realm will only be opened once in a long time, and only when the Primordial Ancestral Realm is opened, the Holy Soul Realm will be opened.

Previously, many Supreme Domain Ancestors wanted to strengthen the Soul Holy Light in order to prepare for entering the Holy Soul Realm.

Otherwise, there wouldn't be so many forces that would have allowed the ancestors of the Supreme Domain to enter the Holy Monument World of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, strengthen the Soul Holy Light, and improve their strength.

The stronger the strength, the more sure you can be of saving your life when you enter the Holy Soul Realm.

Moreover, the Ten Great Holy Gates are afraid that there are many Holy Soul-level Supreme Domain Ancestors who have also suppressed their strength and do not enter the Invincible Domain Ancestor Realm, just preparing for the opportunity of the Holy Soul Realm.

Ye Tian didn't dare to say that his strength must be the strongest, after all, there were many demons in the Dark Sacred Realm, such as those who were endowed with holy souls, plus the gifts of their parents, I am afraid that they had many hole cards and amazing secret treasures.

Therefore, they are also a threat to Ye Tian.

However, once he condenses the Holy Soul, his strength will skyrocket a lot, and he will not be afraid of anything!

"The Holy Soul Realm is opened, you must go to the body, it's useless for the clone to go to improve the soul holy light, the body can't be improved, and the cultivation still can't progress!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This is also a defect of the copying body, if the copying body improves the cultivation, the body will be improved together, how good it would be!

However, this kind of thing can only be thought about.

Ye Tian was going to the Primordial Ancestral Realm, his body was not in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and he was worried about the safety of the human race in the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

As a result, Ye Tian withdrew the copy body of the Battle Ancestor Realm, and then condensed the copy body again in the Xuan Void Saint Realm.

In this way, the copy body sits in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm, while his main body leaves the Xuanxu Sacred Realm and goes to the Dark Sacred Realm.

Ye Tian didn't use that kind of fast-shuttling treasure, in fact, he could easily afford it, but there was no need to use it.

It took him tens of thousands of years to arrive at the Dark Sanctuary and come to the War Ancestor Realm.

There is still a period of time before the Holy Soul Realm opens, otherwise many Supreme Domain Ancestors are still roaming the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it will take time to come back.

Ye Tian took advantage of this time to enter a treasure land in the battle gate, although he had also entered these treasure lands before, but they all copied his body to enter, and the improved cultivation was tantamount to waste.

But now, his body has come, and his improved cultivation is a real improvement!

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's soul holy light increased a little, which was about two percent of the overall soul.

This kind of improvement is also very fast, but with the help of many treasures and many resources, in the future, many treasures of the Battle Gate will not be of much use to him.

this day.

An order from the Battle Gate was issued, that is, Ye Tian's request to apply for the place of the Holy Monument was passed.

The Battle Gate is in charge of a total of more than a dozen holy realms, plus the holy monuments of the ancestral realm, there are many holy monuments, but for a long time, the number of holy monuments has naturally been divided and there is not much left.

It was also because Ye Tian had contributed a lot of the Xuanxu Saint Realm Saint Monument quota to the Battle Gate before, so he could only pass his application this time, but he only obtained one Saint Monument quota.

The quota of this holy monument is located in the Red Maple Sacred Realm under the command of the Battle Gate, and this holy realm was born 5 years before the birth of the realm.

The Realm Year is the time from the birth of an ordinary Realm to its Great Destruction, which is roughly equivalent to 100 million cosmic years, and the cosmic year is the lifespan of an ordinary universe.

From this, you can imagine how long the 5 realms are years.

After such a long time, the number of places for the Holy Monument of the Red Maple Saint Realm has not been used up, and now there are only three places left.

And now, Ye Tian has come to occupy a place again.

The battle gate gave Ye Tian this place, and he also hoped that Ye Tian would be able to increase some strength before entering the Holy Soul Realm, so as to gain more benefits in the Holy Soul Realm.

It would take a long time for the Holy Soul Realm to open, so it was enough for Ye Tian to cultivate in the Red Maple Saint Realm Holy Tablet World for a long time.

After entering the Red Maple Saint Realm, Ye Tian entered the Red Maple Saint Realm Sacred Tablet World and began his own cultivation.

In this way, tens of millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's soul holy light rose sharply.

"The Soul Light occupies three out of three souls!"

Ye Tian muttered.

From two into one to three into three, this kind of progress is also very huge, although compared to the previous progress, it is much worse, but this is also a normal thing, after all, the more powerful the soul holy light, the more difficult it is to improve.

If the increase was the same, wouldn't it be possible for four or five Holy Tablet Worlds to allow a Supreme Domain Ancestor to give birth to a Holy Soul?

That's impossible!

With Ye Tian's powerful soul, if he wanted to completely transform his soul and give birth to a holy soul, he would probably need dozens of Holy Tablet Worlds, or even more.

In other words, if there was no chance in the Holy Soul Realm, he was afraid that it would take endless years to be able to give birth to the Holy Soul.

I have to say that Ye Tian's luck was good, he happened to encounter the opening of the Primordial Ancestral Realm Holy Soul Realm!
